sections.heading: Why Choose Carter & Associates?
sections.body: With over 15 years of experience serving San Francisco and the greater Bay Area, our team of dedicated attorneys combines deep legal expertise with a genuine commitment to our clients. We take the time to understand your situation, explain your options clearly, and fight tirelessly for the best possible outcome.
bullets: Free initial consultations on all cases
No fee unless we win your personal injury case
Over $50 million recovered for our clients
Available evenings and weekends by appointment

sections.heading: Our Commitment to You
sections.body: At Carter & Associates, every case matters. We believe in transparent communication, honest assessments, and relentless advocacy. Our attorneys are accessible, responsive, and dedicated to achieving the results you need.
bullets: Regular case updates and clear communication

testimonials.name: Maria G.
testimonials.text: After my car accident, I didn't know where to turn. Carter & Associates took my case and fought for every dollar I deserved. They kept me informed every step of the way and secured a settlement that covered all my medical bills and more.

testimonials.name: James T.
testimonials.text: Professional, responsive, and genuinely caring. The team at Carter & Associates helped me through a difficult divorce with compassion and expertise. I couldn't have asked for better representation.

testimonials.name: Robert K.
testimonials.text: When I was facing criminal charges, I was terrified. My attorney at Carter & Associates built an incredible defense and got the charges reduced. They truly saved my future.

testimonials.name: Linda S.
testimonials.text: They helped us set up our family trust and estate plan. Everything was explained in plain language, and the process was smooth. Highly recommend for estate planning.

faq.question: Do you offer free consultations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer free initial consultations for all practice areas. During your consultation, we will review your case, explain your legal options, and outline a clear path forward.

faq.question: How much does it cost to hire an attorney?
faq.answer: Personal injury cases are handled on a contingency fee basis, meaning you pay nothing unless we win. For other practice areas, we offer competitive rates and flexible payment plans.

faq.question: How long will my case take?
faq.answer: Every case is unique. During your consultation, we will give you a realistic timeline based on the specifics of your situation. We prioritize efficiency while never compromising on quality.

title: About Carter & Associates Law Firm
metaTitle: About Us | Carter & Associates Law Firm
metaDescription: Learn about Carter & Associates, a client-focused law firm serving San Francisco and the Bay Area for over 15 years. Meet our experienced team of attorneys.
heroSubtitle: A client-focused law firm built on trust, results, and a genuine commitment to justice.

sections.heading: Our Story
sections.body: Founded in 2011, Carter & Associates has grown from a small practice into one of San Francisco's respected law firms. Our founder, Sarah Carter, started the firm with a simple belief: every person deserves access to exceptional legal representation, regardless of their circumstances. Today, our team of experienced attorneys carries that mission forward every day.

sections.heading: Our Values
sections.body: We believe in integrity, excellence, and putting our clients first. Every decision we make is guided by what is best for the people we serve.
bullets: Community involvement and pro bono work

title: Contact Carter & Associates
metaTitle: Contact Us | Carter & Associates Law Firm
metaDescription: Contact Carter & Associates for a free consultation. Call (555) 987-6543 or visit our San Francisco office at 450 Market Street, Suite 200.
heroSubtitle: Reach out for a free consultation. We are here to help with your legal needs.

title: Frequently Asked Questions
metaDescription: Find answers to common legal questions about personal injury, family law, criminal defense, estate planning, and working with an attorney.
heroSubtitle: Answers to common questions about our services and working with an attorney.

faq.question: Do you offer free consultations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer free initial consultations for all practice areas. This gives us a chance to understand your situation and explain your legal options without any obligation.

faq.question: What areas of law do you practice?
faq.answer: We handle personal injury, family law, criminal defense, estate planning, and business law matters. Our diverse team allows us to provide comprehensive legal support.

faq.question: How much does it cost to hire an attorney?
faq.answer: Personal injury cases are handled on a contingency basis - you pay nothing unless we recover compensation for you. Other practice areas have competitive hourly rates or flat fees, with flexible payment plans available.

faq.question: What should I bring to my first consultation?
faq.answer: Bring any relevant documents such as police reports, medical records, contracts, court papers, or correspondence related to your case. The more information we have, the better we can advise you.

faq.question: How long will my case take?
faq.answer: Timelines vary depending on the type and complexity of your case. Simple matters may resolve in weeks, while litigation can take months or longer. We will provide a realistic estimate during your consultation.

faq.question: Do you handle cases outside of San Francisco?
faq.answer: Yes, we represent clients throughout the Bay Area including Oakland, San Jose, Berkeley, Palo Alto, Fremont, and surrounding communities.

faq.question: Can I reach my attorney directly?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We believe in direct communication between clients and their attorneys. You will have your attorney's direct contact information and can expect timely responses to your inquiries.

faq.question: What if I cannot afford an attorney?
faq.answer: We offer contingency fee arrangements for personal injury cases and flexible payment plans for other matters. We also do pro bono work for qualifying clients. Contact us to discuss your options.

title: Personal Injury Attorney in San Francisco
metaDescription: Injured in an accident? Our personal injury attorneys fight for maximum compensation. No fee unless we win. Free consultation. Call (555) 987-6543.
heroSubtitle: Aggressive representation for accident victims. No fee unless we win your case.

sections.heading: Types of Personal Injury Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our experienced personal injury team handles a wide range of accident and injury claims throughout the Bay Area.

sections.heading: Our Approach to Your Case
sections.body: We investigate thoroughly, build strong cases, and negotiate aggressively. If the insurance company won't offer fair compensation, we are fully prepared to take your case to trial.

faq.question: How much is my personal injury case worth?
faq.answer: The value of your case depends on many factors including the severity of your injuries, medical expenses, lost wages, and impact on your quality of life. During your free consultation, we can provide an initial assessment.

faq.question: What is a contingency fee?
faq.answer: A contingency fee means you pay no attorney fees upfront. We only get paid if we successfully recover compensation for you. This ensures access to quality legal representation regardless of your financial situation.

title: Family Law Attorney in San Francisco
metaDescription: Compassionate family law representation in San Francisco. Divorce, custody, child support, and more. Free consultation. Call (555) 987-6543.
heroSubtitle: Compassionate guidance through life's most challenging legal matters.

sections.heading: Family Law Services
sections.body: Our family law team provides compassionate, skilled representation for all family-related legal matters.

faq.question: How long does a divorce take in California?
faq.answer: California has a mandatory 6-month waiting period from the date the respondent is served. The total timeline depends on whether the divorce is contested and the complexity of asset division.

title: Criminal Defense Attorney in San Francisco
metaDescription: Experienced criminal defense attorneys protecting your rights and freedom. From misdemeanors to felonies. Free consultation. Call (555) 987-6543.
heroSubtitle: Protecting your rights, your freedom, and your future.

sections.heading: Criminal Cases We Defend
sections.body: Our criminal defense team has extensive experience defending clients against a wide range of charges.

faq.question: Should I talk to the police without a lawyer?
faq.answer: No. You have the right to remain silent and the right to an attorney. Exercise those rights and contact us immediately. Anything you say can be used against you.

title: Estate Planning Attorney in San Francisco
metaDescription: Protect your legacy with comprehensive estate planning. Wills, trusts, powers of attorney, and probate. Free consultation. Call (555) 987-6543.
heroSubtitle: Protect your family and your legacy with a comprehensive estate plan.

sections.heading: Estate Planning Services
sections.body: Our estate planning attorneys help you plan for the future and protect what matters most.

faq.question: Do I really need an estate plan?
faq.answer: Yes. Without an estate plan, California law determines how your assets are distributed, who cares for your children, and who makes medical decisions for you. An estate plan puts you in control.

title: Business Law Attorney in San Francisco
metaDescription: Strategic legal counsel for businesses of all sizes. Contracts, formation, disputes, and compliance. Free consultation. Call (555) 987-6543.
heroSubtitle: Strategic legal counsel to help your business thrive.

sections.heading: Business Legal Services
sections.body: From startups to established enterprises, we provide the legal foundation your business needs to succeed.

faq.question: What business structure is right for me?
faq.answer: The best structure depends on your goals, liability concerns, tax situation, and growth plans. During a consultation, we can analyze your needs and recommend the optimal structure.
